programme.title: Sarah's House
programme.desc: Channel youthful vibes for two kids’ bedrooms where colour and comfort rule.

programme.title: Sarah's House
programme.desc: Admire Sarah’s new bathroom, where practical fixtures mix with luxe finishes.

programme.title: Sarah's House
programme.desc: Gain inspiration from an antique market find for this fresh farmhouse bedroom.

programme.title: Sarah's House

programme.title: Sarah's House
programme.desc: Venture outside the city to see Sarah personalize a new-build suburban home.

programme.desc: Warm up to a family room reno that brings balance to an off-centre fireplace.

programme.title: Candice Tells All
programme.desc: Snag smart budget-squeezing tips and cheer the crew in a building competition.

programme.title: Candice Tells All
programme.desc: Endure a guest’s charming interruptions as Candice dolls up a dull kitchen.

programme.title: Candice Tells All
programme.desc: Stand back as fresh paint modernizes a forest of natural oak in a family room.

programme.title: Candice Tells All
programme.desc: Look inside a popular film house and see its boring bedroom get a soothing look.

programme.title: Candice Tells All
programme.desc: Tally up the tons of books that need to move before a home library facelift.

programme.desc: Visit the bustling job site, then get a lesson in local wetlands preservation.

programme.desc: Race the clock as tech and landscaping go in and crew issues boil over…again.

programme.desc: Get spooked by a monster cake adorned with googly eyes and oozing fake blood.

programme.desc: Face a tall order when a birthday boy orders a towering cake in his go-to hue.

programme.desc: Watch the bakers whip up colourful confection filled with exploding candy.

programme.title: Best Cake Wins
programme.desc: Find out how the bakers add a croc and explosive magic to a three-flavour cake.

programme.desc: See Mike and a host of volunteers rebuild a prized playground levelled by arson.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right
programme.desc: Reckon with mould, dry rot, and ants when Mike rebuilds a home swamped by rain.

programme.desc: Explore a custom-built healing oasis, where a boxing legend KOs the big reveal.

programme.desc: Look at a nightmare kitchen reno and see Mike restore a cheated couple’s faith.

programme.desc: Take a look at Mike’s DIY do-over and some sign-language-friendly upgrades.

programme.desc: Cast a light on all the fixable issues in a young family’s ice-cold new house.
